title: Clinical Co-Pilot Claim List
description: The LLM output-contract shape (ARCHITECTURE.md §2.1): a list of claim objects the reduce pass and every chat turn must emit as structured output. This file is the human-readable mirror of OpenEMR\Modules\ClinicalCopilot\Reduce\Claim::jsonSchema() -- that method, not this file, is what is actually sent to the provider as `responseSchema` and used by Verify\ClaimSchema (V1); keep the two in sync on any change.

text.description: The narrated claim, verbatim as rendered (subject to V4 numeric grounding and V5 banned-claim lint).

claim_type.description: Closed enum. Only greeting/refusal/retrieval_status/uncertainty_statement may legally carry zero citations (V2), and even then only if the text/numeric_values carry no clinical content.

citation_ids.description: fact_id values this claim is grounded in. Must resolve against the session fact set (V2) and every resolved fact's pid must equal the pinned pid (V3).

numeric_values.description: Every number the claim asserts, called out explicitly so V4 does not have to rely solely on regex-scraping free text.

flags.description: Open string set. `conflict` is the one flag V6 checks for: required on any claim citing a conflict-flagged fact.

order.description: 0-based position in the model's own output list -- ordering/emphasis metadata (§2.1).

emphasis.description: Free-form emphasis signal (e.g. "high"/"normal"), carried through to rendering. Never gates verification (§2.4: misleading emphasis is a named, uncaught residual).
